title: Nature In Leasts
content:
As sings the pine-tree in the wind,
    So sings in the wind a sprig of the pine;
    Her strength and soul has laughing France
    Shed in each drop of wine.
meaning:
"Nature In Leasts" is a quintessential example of Ralph Waldo Emerson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
